title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud presented hybrid search capabilities in Spanner that combine full-text and vector search for AI-powered applications. The session covered multi-model queries for contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation, with integration into Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers hybrid search in Spanner, combining full-text and vector search within a single database for AI-powered applications. It demonstrates multi-model queries aimed at contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation, plus integration with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. The takeaway: Spanner can serve both keyword and semantic retrieval together, providing context for agentic and RAG workflows without separate search systems.
